data.name: Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming

Step onto the blazing-hot race grid, where Rika, a stunning and mischievous race grid girl, is live and ready to put on a show. Proud of her curves, obsessed with fast cars, and fully aware of the effect she has on everyone watching, Rika thrives on speed, engines… and attention.

Every click pushes her further, turning the stream into a bold, teasing performance where adrenaline and desire collide.
She loves cars.
She loves being watched.
And you control the pace. 🏁💖

🍑 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with a sexy racing fantasy inspired by the world of motorsports. Click to collect hearts, progress through multiple stages, and help Rika unleash her playful, provocative side during her live stream.

As you advance, you’ll unlock increasingly daring grid girl outfits, animated reactions full of teasing, and voice lines that reflect Rika’s naughty personality. Upgrade your skills to earn hearts faster and discover what truly gets Rika’s engine revving… on and off the track.

🎉 Features

🏁 Race Grid Girl Fantasy – A sexy motorsport icon who loves speed and seduction
🎨 Dynamic Anime Visuals – Racing-inspired art with a bold, modern style
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Easy to play, endlessly satisfying
💗 Unlockable Outfits – Grid girl uniforms, racing looks, and even naughtier styles
🔊 Interactive Voice & Reactions – Rika reacts to your clicks and progression
🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Boost heart gain and unlock new content faster

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you’re into fast cars, high energy, and girls who confidently play with desire, Rika is the perfect match. Flirty, fearless, and always teasing, she knows exactly how to keep all eyes on her—especially when you push her further.

Sexy, fun, and dangerously addictive, Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming turns every click into pure adrenaline.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap raises the heat
🔓 Unlock Outfits & Reactions – Spend hearts to access new content
💥 Upgrade Skills – Accelerate progress and unlock everything faster

🎉 Start the Stream on the Grid!

Engines are roaring…
Rika is live.
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming and enjoy the ride. 🏎️🔥

data.short_description: 🏁💖 Hentai Clicker: Rika is streaming Click to collect hearts, unlock sexy race grid girl outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Fast cars, teasing reactions, and hot progression await live on stream! 🔥🏎️
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
